# Artesian

> Memory control plane for agent loops. Artesian keeps an agent's working context small,
> high-signal, and survivable across compaction and disconnects, so memory guides the next action —
> not just recalls a fact — and is owned by you, portable across any model and any retrieval store.

Artesian is a Rust workspace. It layers an ACC-style control plane (`headgate`) over a
token-efficient retrieval store (`aquifer`), with optional orchestration, sandboxing, and
evaluation. It is MCP-first, ships pluggable backends, and builds to one static binary.

## Concepts
- ACC / CCS: a bounded, schema-governed committed context state, updated through a qualify-gate.
- Recall is not use: memory must guide the next action, not merely return a relevant fact.
- Interface is not substrate: human-readable files as the interface over a transactional,
  semantically-indexed store as the substrate.

## Docs
- [Why Artesian (positioning)](https://github.com/aquifer-labs/artesian/blob/main/docs/positioning.md): the problem, the three gaps, and the ACC wedge.
- [Roadmap](https://github.com/aquifer-labs/artesian/blob/main/docs/roadmap.md): where the project is going and why.
- [Architecture](https://github.com/aquifer-labs/artesian/blob/main/docs/architecture.md): the crates and the data flow.
- [Composability (LEGO)](https://github.com/aquifer-labs/artesian/blob/main/docs/composability.md): use one brick or the whole set.
- [Why Rust](https://github.com/aquifer-labs/artesian/blob/main/docs/why-rust.md): the concrete wins from a Rust core.
- [Backends](https://github.com/aquifer-labs/artesian/blob/main/docs/backends.md): files, sqlite-vec, Qdrant, pgvector.
- [Modes](https://github.com/aquifer-labs/artesian/blob/main/docs/modes.md): memory, orchestrate, full.
- [Self-repair](https://github.com/aquifer-labs/artesian/blob/main/docs/self-repair.md): surviving compaction and disconnects.

## Source
- [Repository](https://github.com/aquifer-labs/artesian)
